# verifyPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for verifyPassword

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useVerifyPasswordMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useVerifyPasswordMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useVerifyPasswordMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
